_description: Expected schema for NewsEvent manual drop-zone files. PIT gate = publishedAt.
_forbidden_pit_gate: ingestedAt — must NOT be used as PIT availability anchor
_status: INTAKE_ONLY — no scoring until P29-F dry-run gate

required_fields.name: symbol
required_fields.notes: Listed ticker on TWSE or TPEX. Use '市場' for broad market events.

required_fields.name: eventId
required_fields.format: Unique identifier for this event row (e.g. UUID or source-assigned ID)
required_fields.notes: Used for deduplication. Must be stable across re-imports of the same event.

required_fields.name: eventDate
required_fields.notes: The date the event occurred (calendar date, not time). May equal publishedAt date.

required_fields.name: publishedAt
required_fields.notes: PIT GATE — the timestamp the article/announcement was publicly published. NOT ingestedAt.

required_fields.name: eventSummary
required_fields.format: Plain text summary of the event (max 2000 chars)

required_fields.name: sourceName
required_fields.example: TWSE Announcement, MoneyDJ, Economic Daily News

required_fields.name: sourceUrl
required_fields.format: Permanent URL or archived URL of the original publication
required_fields.notes: Must be verifiable. Use archive.org URL if original may expire.

required_fields.name: sourceChecksum
required_fields.format: SHA256 of the source document at time of collection

required_fields.name: verificationStatus
required_fields.notes: UNVERIFIED = collected but not manually reviewed; OPERATOR_REVIEWED = reviewed by operator; CROSS_REFERENCED = confirmed by multiple sources

required_fields.name: notes
required_fields.notes: Free text — e.g. translation note, source quality concern, duplicate flag

forbidden_fields.name: sentimentLabel
forbidden_fields.reason: No sentiment labels in intake zone — would introduce look-ahead bias if applied before PIT validation

forbidden_fields.name: priceReaction
forbidden_fields.reason: Future price reaction is outcome leakage — absolutely forbidden

forbidden_fields.name: ingestedAt
forbidden_fields.reason: System ingestion timestamp is NOT the PIT gate — use publishedAt

forbidden_fields.name: approvalToken
forbidden_fields.reason: Approval token is generated by the import gate, not placed manually

forbidden_fields.name: isMock
forbidden_fields.reason: Mock events must never enter this drop-zone
